rolesanywhere.crl.CfnAbout:
Imports the certificate revocation list (CRL). A CRL is a list of certificates that have been revoked by the issuing certificate Authority (CA).In order to be properly imported, a CRL must be in PEM format. IAM Roles Anywhere validates against the CRL before issuing credentials. 

**Required permissions: **`rolesanywhere:ImportCrl`.

rolesanywhere.crl.CrlData.Description: The x509 v3 specified certificate revocation list (CRL).

rolesanywhere.crl.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether the certificate revocation list (CRL) is enabled.

rolesanywhere.crl.Name.Description: The name of the certificate revocation list (CRL).

rolesanywhere.crl.Tags.Description: A list of tags to attach to the certificate revocation list (CRL).

rolesanywhere.crl.TrustAnchorArn.Description: The ARN of the TrustAnchor the certificate revocation list (CRL) will provide revocation for.
